data.title: CenterPoint Energy prepares for winter weather in Texas with 3,300-person workforce; 3 staging sites active.
data.description: Around 3,300 workers from CenterPoint, including both employees and contractors, are currently aiding in storm readiness and potential recovery in Houston and certain areas of Southeast Texas. The Emergency Operations Center is currently fully staffed and operational, with three staging sites set to be activated today. This marks the beginning of daily operational efforts to address the impending storm and any resulting damages.

data.title: WSI in Appleton achieves gap-free audit in Houston, advancing industry sustainability with OCS Logistics Certification.
data.description: WSI (Warehouse Specialists, LLC) based in Appleton, Wisconsin, revealed on January 22, 2026, that their warehouse operations at a specialized manufacturing customer site in the extended Houston region have attained Operation Clean Sweep® (OCS) Logistics Certification. This certification signifies a significant achievement for the company in maintaining environmentally friendly practices and ensuring the proper handling and disposal of materials in their facilities.

data.title: Intuitive Surgical stock rises after exceeding Q4 earnings expectations: Revenue of $2.87B surpasses $2.75B estimates.
data.description: Intuitive Surgical Inc. released their fourth quarter financial results after the market closed on Thursday. The company reported revenue of $2.87 billion, surpassing analyst predictions of $2.75 billion. Their adjusted earnings for the quarter were $2.53 per share. Intuitive Surgical stock is currently on an upward trend following the positive report. The company's performance in Q4 exceeded expectations, indicating strong financial health. For further details, the full story can be accessed on a financial news platform.

data.title: Valero Energy raises quarterly cash dividend on common stock from $1.13 to $1.20 per share, making annual rate $4.80.
data.description: The Board of Directors of Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE: VLO) has announced a hike in its regular quarterly cash dividend on common stock from $1.13 per share to $1.20 per share. This change will result in an annualized cash dividend rate of $4.80 per share. Shareholders of record at the close of business on February 5, 2026, will receive the increased dividend on March 9, 2026. This decision reflects the company's commitment to enhancing shareholder value.

data.description: On January 22, 2026, Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE: EXR) disclosed the tax breakdown of its 2025 dividend payouts on common stock. These allocations, to be detailed in Form 1099-DIV, are outlined for common shareholders.

data.title: Americans are avoiding returns on broken or unwanted products due to difficult processes, with 46% forgoing returns in the past year.
data.description: In ADA, Oklahoma, a recent survey has revealed that American consumers are choosing to keep defective or unwanted purchases rather than returning them, citing a cumbersome return process as the main reason. Nearly 46% of consumers have held onto items in the past year, leading to a loss of entitled refunds. The trend is especially prevalent during the January return period, resulting in retailers retaining revenue from flawed products and buyer dissatisfaction.
